name: RABBIT-SPEC-BACKLOG-9
title: Invariant test gap closures: generated_at format, Inv 2 open-vs-specific judgment, Inv 10 meta-test, real impl-suggestion validation
description:
rabbit-spec spec.md declares invariants documented as testable but several are unverified or vacuously satisfied:

1. Inv 3 sub-clause about generated_at shape 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ' (RFC 3339 with Z suffix) is mandated in spec.md:84-85 ('Test must assert this shape') but the only test merely checks the substring 'ISO 8601' appears in spec.md — it does NOT assert the format is documented in SKILL.md, nor parse any actual impl-suggestion output.

2. Inv 2 has no direct test — requires the skill to judge open-ended vs specific before deciding which superpowers to invoke. Implicit-only coverage via brainstorming/writing-plans substring tests would pass even if the conditional mapping broke.

3. Inv 10 ('every numbered invariant MUST have at least one test') has no meta-test that parses the spec invariant list and checks coverage.

4. No test parses an actual impl-suggestion JSON output — every current test asserts on SKILL.md text only.

Fix: add a real generated_at format regex check on a sample/generated impl-suggestion file; add an Inv 2 test asserting SKILL.md documents the open→brainstorming+writing-plans / specific→writing-plans mapping; add an Inv 10 meta-test that walks the invariant list.
